---
title: "Your Post Title"
description: "One sentence summary of what this post covers."
image: featured.png
categories:
  - R
  - Data Visualization
date: 2025-03-01
---

## Introduction

What is this post about? What will readers learn?

## The Content

Explain the concept, skill, or analysis. Code chunks work here too.

```r
library(tidyverse)

# your code here
```

## Key Takeaway

What's the one thing you want readers to walk away with?

## Resources

- [Link to dataset or tutorial](#)
